subcodes.first_line: The Day hath come wherein the heavens have brought forth a manifest smoke, and the Day hath come wherein the mountains move as move the clouds [3.5s]... ...O my Lord, my Master, and the Goal of my Desire! I have heard that Thou hast declared this to be a Day whereon if anyone, with complete sincerity
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی یوم فیه اتت السماء بدخان مبین و اتی یوم فیه مرت الجبال کمر السحاب
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @knowledge; recognition of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power of prayer, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
